ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1
process_details: Ball milling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 2:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 110 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 2:1 BM at 4 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 128 days by XRPD and 133 days by FTIR. SVS-GPZ BM 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures remained amorphous for over 4 months when stored at 4 C/0% RH.
notes: RH 0% achieved with P2O5 desiccant. SVS-GPZ 2:1 BM Tg = 41.1 +/- 6.2 C (Table 1).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1
process_details: Ball milling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 2:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 110 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 2:1 BM at 25 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 44 days by XRPD and 14 days by FTIR. Onset of recrystallization was observed at 44 days when stored at 25 C/0% RH by XRPD with the 2:1 mixture; FTIR suggested that recrystallization might have started even earlier, at 14 days.
notes: RH 0% achieved with P2O5 desiccant. FTIR (surface, 2 um penetration) detected onset earlier than XRPD (bulk).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1
process_details: Ball milling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 2:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 110 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 2:1 BM at 25 C/60% RH: crystallization detected at 8 days by XRPD and 2 days by FTIR. At 25 C/60% RH, the onset of recrystallization was found to be fast (detected at 8 and at 16 days for 2:1 and 1:1-mixtures respectively); FTIR showed that recrystallization occurred already within two days.
notes: RH 60% achieved with saturated NaBr solution. FTIR (surface) detected onset much earlier than XRPD (bulk).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1
process_details: Ball milling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 110 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:1 BM at 4 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 128 days by XRPD and 139 days by FTIR. SVS-GPZ BM 2:1 and 1:1 mixtures remained amorphous for over 4 months when stored at 4 C/0% RH.
notes: RH 0% achieved with P2O5 desiccant. SVS-GPZ 1:1 BM Tg = 46.3 +/- 6.6 C (Table 1).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1
process_details: Ball milling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 110 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:1 BM at 25 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 52 days by XRPD and 35 days by FTIR. Onset of recrystallization was observed at 52 days when stored at 25 C/0% RH by XRPD with the 1:1 mixture; FTIR suggested that recrystallization might have started earlier, at 35 days.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ BM, in molar ratios of 2:1 and 1:1
process_details: Ball milling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 110 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301).
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:1 BM at 25 C/60% RH: crystallization detected at 16 days by XRPD and 8 days by FTIR. At 25 C/60% RH, the onset of recrystallization was found to be fast (detected at 8 and at 16 days for 2:1 and 1:1-mixtures respectively).
notes: RH 60% achieved with saturated NaBr solution.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 2:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 2:1 CM at 4 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 74 days by XRPD and 79 days by FTIR. At 4 C/0% RH, the 2:1 co-amorphous mixture was found to be stable for over 2 months.
notes: RH 0% achieved with P2O5 desiccant. SVS-GPZ 2:1 CM Tg = 41.5 +/- 5.1 C (Table 1).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 2:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 2:1 CM at 25 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 53 days by XRPD and 58 days by FTIR. The 2:1 CM mixture was much more stable in all conditions; peaks started to appear at 53 days at 25 C/0% RH; FTIR confirmed onset of crystallization at 58 days.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 2:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 2:1 CM at 25 C/60% RH: crystallization detected at 46 days by both XRPD and FTIR. The 2:1 CM mixture was much more stable in all conditions; peaks started to appear at 46 days at 25 C/60% RH.
notes: RH 60% achieved with saturated NaBr solution.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:1 CM at 4 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 88 days by XRPD and 85 days by FTIR. 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions.
notes: RH 0% achieved with P2O5 desiccant. SVS-GPZ 1:1 CM Tg = 46.7 +/- 5.2 C (Table 1).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:1 CM at 25 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 74 days by XRPD and 79 days by FTIR. 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:1 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:1 CM at 25 C/60% RH: crystallization detected at 74 days by XRPD and 65 days by FTIR. 1:1 CM mixtures were found to be stable for over 2 months in all conditions.
notes: RH 60% achieved with saturated NaBr solution.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:2 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling. Note: 1:2 BM was excluded due to remaining crystallinity (excess GPZ); only CM produced fully amorphous 1:2 mixture.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:2 CM at 4 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 95 days by XRPD and 92 days by FTIR. FTIR and XRPD both showed that when stored at 4 C/0% RH, the 1:2 SVS-GPZ CM mixture was stable for approx. 90 days.
notes: RH 0% achieved with P2O5 desiccant. SVS-GPZ 1:2 CM Tg = 53.6 +/- 5.3 C (Table 1).

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:2 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:2 CM at 25 C/0% RH: crystallization detected at 74 days by XRPD and 72 days by FTIR. FTIR and XRPD indicated that, when stored at 25 C/0% RH, 1:2 SVS-GPZ CM started to recrystallize after approx. 70 days of storage.

ratio_source_quote: SVS-GPZ CM, in molar ratios of 2:1, 1:1 and 1:2
process_details: Cryomilling: 500 mg total mass of crystalline SVS and GPZ in 1:2 molar ratio in milling chamber with three 9 mm stainless steel balls, milled at 30 Hz for 60 min in an oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301) placed in a +4 C cold room. Chambers immersed in liquid N2 for 2 min before milling and at 10 min intervals during milling.
source_quote: SVS-GPZ 1:2 CM at 25 C/60% RH: crystallization detected at 74 days by XRPD and 58 days by FTIR. When stored at 25 C/60% RH, onset of recrystallization was detected by XRPD after 74 days of storage, but FTIR indicated changes occurring already after 58 days of storage.
notes: RH 60% achieved with saturated NaBr solution. The 1:2 co-amorphous mixture was the most stable, stable for over 2 months in all conditions.
